query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.orderNumber,
  p.amount,
  p.status,
  o.userId,
  u.name as userName,
  o.createdAt
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN orders o ON p.orderId = o.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id
WHERE p.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
